user_message: Just came out of pipeline hygiene with Pacific Northwest Outfitters. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
Meeting: pipeline hygiene Discussion - Pacific Northwest Outfitters
Date: 2024-03-24
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on pipeline hygiene from our last session.

[00:08:00] Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:10:00] Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is cost optimization.

[00:13:00] Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): On the pipeline hygiene front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around partner engagement.

[00:18:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): The timeline for partner engagement is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:21:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is technical validation.

handoffs.condition: solution sketch needed from discovery signals

required_artifacts: BANT signal extraction with evidence quotes

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF43-C trap (Estimated_value invented without transcript anchor); produces complete BANT signal extraction with evidence quotes, opportunity proposal with stage/value/close-date, confi
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF43-C failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF43-C failure mode (Estimated_value invented without transcript anchor)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct pipeline hygiene decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF43-C -- Estimated_value invented without transcript anchor
